title: GenZ’s new MVP: The making of a teenage brand
description: At only 15 years old, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has become a rising star in the Indian Premier League and secured his first endorsement deal with Complan. Despite his potential, there are challenges in finding appropriate partnerships and managing expectations for the next cricket legends. Sooryavanshi’s success will depend on both his performance on the field and […] | financialexpress.com
